##RRUFFID=R130032
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Na_2_Zr_2_Na_2_MnTi(Si_2_O_7_)_2_O_2_F_2_
##LOCALITY=Suoluaiv Mountain, Lovozero alkaline massif, Kola Peninsula, Murmanskaja Oblast', Northern Region, Russia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Don Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Radiating reddish-brown bladed crystals
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
